ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the weather station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the weather station in meters */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of the weather station (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Active status of the weather station (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station that collected the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the recorded weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Recorded temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Recorded humidity percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Recorded wind speed in km/h */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of samples taken for the record */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for measurement (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather category (e.g., Temperature, Humidity, Windspeed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the category (e.g., Celsius, percentage, km/h) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, HTML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail in the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report this detail belongs to */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data included in the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data point in the report */,
  "visualization" TEXT /* Visualization type (e.g., chart, graph, table) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES weather_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather alert */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station issuing the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Severe Weather, Flood Warning) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the alert */,
  "issued_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was issued */,
  "expiry_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert response */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the alert being responded to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responding to the alert */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the response */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken in response to the alert */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_responses_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alerts ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the quality check */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is valid (true/false) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality check */,
  "check_method" TEXT /* Method used for quality check (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_checks_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station for the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date for which the forecast is generated */,
  "temperature_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted humidity percentage */,
  "windspeed_forecast" REAL /* Forecasted wind speed in km/h */,
  "forecast_model" TEXT /* Model used for forecasting (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_forecasts_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "submitted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the feedback was submitted */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of feedback (e.g., data, visualization, usability) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, database, file) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data import */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date of the data import */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the imported data in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
